Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Event Log: Activities: RA: Receive Application VF: Validate Form AE: Assess Eligibility RMI: Request Missing Info AD: Approval Decision SC: Send Confirmation AC: Archive Case Case 1: RA -> VF -> AE -> RMI -> VF -> AD -> SC -> AC Case 2: RA -> VF -> AE -> AD -> SC -> AC Case 3: RA -> VF -> AE -> RMI -> RMI -> VF -> AD -> SC -> AC

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Identify Patterns and Control Flow: Start: All cases start with Receive Application RA. Middle: All cases proceed to Validate Form VF then Assess Eligibility AE. Loop/Choice: After AE, variation. Case 2 goes straight to Approval Decision AD. Case 1 goes RMI -> VF -> AD. Case 3 goes RMI -> RMI -> VF -> AD. End: All cases end with AD -> SC -> AC.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Refined Flow: RA -> VF -> AE -> Loop Block: Option 1: Exit loop Go to AD. Option 2: Execute RMI. If RMI occurs VF must occur again before AD. Case 3 shows RMI -> RMI -> VF. Abstract the loop: After AE, might need RMI. If RMI, re-validate VF.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Main Flow vs Exception Flow. Main: RA -> VF -> AE -> AD -> SC -> AC. Exception: AE -> RMI -> VF -> AD with RMI potentially repeating. Model section after AE as loop structure. Segment after AE: Case 2 empty -> AD. Case 1 RMI -> VF -> AD. Case 3 RMI -> RMI -> VF -> AD. Looks like loop of RMI followed by VF then AD but Case 2 skips.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - NE
Text: XOR choice: Path 1 AD Direct. Path 2 RMI Loop -> VF -> AD. If RMI is loop * RMI RMI followed by VF. Use X AD * RMI RMI VF but realizes duplication. Better RA VF AE -> X tau -> * RMI RMI VF AD SC AC.

Name: Validation - NE
Text: * RMI RMI means Execute RMI then Exit or RMI then RMI. Traces RMI length 1 or RMI RMI RMI length 3 etc odd numbers only. Problem Case 3 has 2 RMIs even number.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Switch to * RMI tau. Trace: RMI then Exit or tau then RMI. Allows RMI 1, or RMI tau RMI 2, or RMI tau RMI tau RMI 3 etc any number >=1 since tau silent.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Verify: Loop branch -> * RMI tau VF. Case 1: RMI VF. Case 3: RMI tau RMI VF visible RMI RMI VF. XOR X tau that handles Case 2: tau to AD. Full traces match all cases perfectly.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Final Structure: -> RA VF AE X tau -> * RMI tau VF AD SC AC. Root sequence with XOR after AE between tau skip and correction sequence loop RMI tau then VF.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Notation: Use multi-argument -> or nested binary. Python code shows multiple children so n-ary sequence valid. tau valid leaf for skip and loop body.
